rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core literature: both are FMCG brand-level market-response studies using dynamic time-series frameworks with impulse-response style analysis (cited: VAR/VECM + GIRF for long-term promotion effects; citing: VARX + GIRF/GFEVD for sales response). Given this methodological and substantive overlap, this is not clearly an incidental mention and should be retained for full relation judgment.
